hero.title: Images of sacramental life, parish memory, and shared celebration
hero.lede: A quiet visual archive of the parish themes already named publicly: baptisms, First Eucharist, Confirmation, anniversaries, and community gatherings.

intro.title: Moments of worship and community
intro.body: The parish gallery points to sacramental milestones and communal memories that help visitors recognise St Nick's as a living, worshipping community.
intro.asideTitle: The current parish gallery names five recurring strands
asideItems: Doing what we know how to do best

cards.title: A visible parish memory
paragraphs: The gallery helps visitors see that the parish is not only a place for Mass times and notices, but also a community shaped by sacramental life and shared milestones.

albums.title: Baptisms
albums.body: Photographs of baptisms and parish welcome into the life of the Church.

albums.title: First Eucharist
albums.body: First Holy Communion celebrations gathered in one album for parish families and visitors.

albums.title: Confirmation
albums.body: Confirmation photographs showing young people and families marking this sacramental step together.

albums.title: 170 Anniversary
albums.body: Anniversary photographs preserving the parish memory of celebration, worship, and community gathering.

albums.title: Doing what we know how to do best
albums.body: An album for the wider parish story: celebration, hospitality, service, and shared community life.
